hooks.command:
# SCAFFOLD (does nothing): matcher 'ExampleToolName' never matches a real tool. To use, change matcher to a real tool name (e.g. "Bash" or "Write|Edit") and replace this command. The tool-call JSON arrives on stdin; parse the file path with: node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);process.stdout.write((j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.command)||"")})'. Exit code 2 from a PreToolUse hook BLOCKS the tool and feeds stderr back to Claude.
exit 0

f=$(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath)||"";process.stdout.write(p)}catch(e){}})'); case "$f" in *.rs) rustfmt "$f" 2>/dev/null;; *.vue|*.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.css|*.scss|*.html|*.md|*.yaml|*.yml) ( cd "$(dirname "$f")" && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" ) >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; exit 0
